pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 11; keeping 1.8 may cause compatibility issues or fail to utilize J11 features, though often this is a configuration prerequisite rather than a direct syntax fix in pom.xml itself, it is the core intent of the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a newer release compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may not support Java 11 bytecode generation or annotation processing correctly.
